full_text:
Huang Yueying 黃月英
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Yueying (黃月英). Zhuge Liang’s wife. Huang Chengyan’s daughter. Was very smart, but not beautiful. Huang Yueying was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Huang Yueying lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
